ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 15th May 2026, 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance on **15th May 2026** from **02:00 UTC to 04:00 UTC**. During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable.

**What to expect**
- No remote access via VPN
- Workstations will remain available locally
- No impact on internal email or collaboration tools

**Action required**
- If you are scheduled to work remotely on that day, plan accordingly.
- If you encounter any connectivity issues after the maintenance window, please report them to IT Helpdesk.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Shipment Missed Delivery – Pay Fee Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking # 1Z999AA10123456784) was **not delivered** due to an outstanding fee of **$49.99**. Our records indicate that the delivery attempt was made on **14th May 2026** but the recipient was unavailable.

If this fee is not paid within **24 hours**, your package will be returned to the sender and may be permanently lost. To avoid further delays and additional charges, please complete the payment immediately.

**How to pay**
1. Click the secure link below:
   <URL>
2. Enter your tracking number and the payment details.
3. Confirm the transaction.

Once the payment is received, your package will be re‑scheduled for delivery.

Please treat this as a priority. Failure to act will result in the shipment being returned.

Thank you for choosing FedEx.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
